response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched video, identified performer as Tokino Sora and song as '決意のソラへ'. 2. Searched for lyrics using '決意のソラへ ときのそら lyrics'. 3. Found full lyrics and translation on uta5.com. 4. Mapped performance to the main song duration. 5. Identified the outro as a static image.
response.global_summary: The video is a full stage performance of the song "Ketsui no Sora e" by VTuber Tokino Sora. The video concludes with a promotional image for her birthday event.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora performs her song 'Ketsui no Sora e' on a virtual stage. The scene shows her singing and dancing, with visual effects behind her.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
一度きりの私の物語は 運命を超えて煌めくんだ 行こう
ねぇ 私より私のことを わかってくれるキミの存在が 臆病で泣き虫な心に 勇気と言う魔法をかけたの
チクタク 時計の針だけが進む 立ち止まってちゃダメだ ソラ転び八起きがお決まりでしょ
一つ一つ重ねてきた 大切なアルバムをめくるように 一つ一つ叶えてきた今日まで その全てにキミがいてくれた 終わりのない夢を ずっとずっとずっとずっと 追いかけて行こう 行こう
ねぇ ここで笑い合えることが 何よりも大事な真実
チクチク イタズラなハートが痛む 空回り空(そら)回り 思考回路フル回転で よーいどん
泣いて泣いて泣いた夜も 大切な人生のストーリーだから 夢を夢で終わらせたくないんだ まだ見ぬ景色を見に行こうよ
もっともっと かがやいて 高く高く 飛び立とう 奇跡さえも越えて
一つ一つ重ねてきた 未来地図のページをめくるように
泣いて泣いて泣いた夜も 大切な人生のストーリーだから 夢を夢で終わらせたくないんだ まだ見ぬ景色を見に行こうよ 終わりのない歌を キミにキミにキミへと届け ずっとずっと誓うの 決意のソラへ 行こう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Once my story is Beyond the fate Let's go
I want you more than me The presence of you Cowardly and crying Magic called courage
Chichika Of a clock, to advance You must stop You must decide if you are going
Each one has gone over Like an important album Until today one has come true All of you were there Endless dream All the way for a long time Let's chase
Here you can laugh An important truth
Chilly I have a sorrowful heart Around the sky Thinking circuit full rotation Yodo Udon
Cry, cry and cry Because it is an important life story I don't want to dream my dream Let's go to see the scenery yet
More and more Jump high Even beyond the miracle
Each one has gone over Turning the future map page
Cry, cry and cry Because it is an important life story I don't want to dream my dream Let's go to see the scenery yet Endless song I send you to Kimi I swear forever Go to sola of determination

scenes.description: The song ends and the screen displays a promotional illustration for 'Tokino Sora Birthday Party 2026'.
